caveats: This is a derived source candidate from named NHD flowline segments, not a final raftable channel centerline.
One endpoint extends slightly outside the pilot bbox because the source extract preserved full bbox-intersecting features.
NHD flowlines do not encode rapid-scale banks, shelves, boulders, holes, boils, eddy lines, or seasonal wetted width.
No manual guide, imagery, terrain, or hydrology alignment has been completed for this candidate yet.
promotion_gates: Confirm the east-to-west orientation against official NHD flow direction, DEM slope, CDEC/USGS station context, and guide review.
Reproject from EPSG:4269 source coordinates into the selected working CRS before stationing or metric cross-section work.
Align the candidate line to the NAIP source drape, 3DEP heightfield, visible wetted channel, banks, islands, side channels, and access points.
Derive reviewed bank polygons and cross sections before replacing seed solver or Unreal corridor geometry.
Attach guide-reviewed rapid, eddy, recovery-pool, pin, surf, and rescue annotations before gameplay tuning uses this line.
